terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: These Terms of Use (“Terms”) govern use of the FKT7 application (“the App”), created by Suito Sogyo Co., Ltd. and provided by 7-Eleven Higashihiracho Store, Hiranokitani Store, and Ninjaichieki-Minami Store (“the Store”). By using the App, you agree to these Terms.
terms.s1_body: These Terms set forth the rights and obligations between the Store and members regarding use of the App.
terms.s2_body: Registration is required to use the App. Information you provide must be accurate and up to date. Registration with false information is prohibited.
terms.s3_body:
Members must not:
・Engage in conduct that violates laws or public order and morals
・Infringe the rights of the Store or third parties
・Interfere with operation of the App
・Violate house rules established by the Store
・Engage in any other conduct the Store deems inappropriate
terms.s4_body: Copyrights, trademarks, and other intellectual property rights in App content (text, images, design, logos, programs, etc.) belong to the Store or rightful licensors. Members may not copy, modify, republish, sell, or otherwise use such content without the Store’s prior written consent.
terms.s5_before: The Store handles members’ personal information in accordance with its
terms.s5_after: . Use of the App constitutes agreement to that policy.
terms.s6_p1: The Store may display advertisements, promotions, banners, and affiliate links (including performance-based referral links) from the Store or third parties on the App. Whether, what, how long, and where such content appears may change at the Store’s discretion.
terms.s6_before_link: For details on how such content is presented, see the
terms.s6_p3: If you use third-party services or products via affiliate links, the transaction is between you and the third party; the Store is not responsible for such transactions (except where the Store directly provides the product or service).
terms.s7_body:
The Store may run coupon distribution, fortune-style or lottery-style promotions, and other campaigns on the App (collectively, “Campaigns”).

Details of each Campaign—including eligibility, period, how winners are selected, prize content and quantity, how prizes are provided, and whether you win—will be announced in the App, via push notification, or by other means the Store specifies.

The Store will comply with the Act against Unjustifiable Premiums and Misleading Representations, the Act on Prevention of Unjustifiable Premiums and Misleading Representations, and other applicable laws and guidelines, and will conduct Campaigns fairly.

The Store may change or cancel a Campaign, or refuse to provide a prize or winning status, for operational reasons. Except in cases of intentional misconduct or gross negligence, the Store is not liable for damages arising therefrom.

Specific rules for each Campaign prevail over these Terms if they conflict with these Terms.
terms.s8_body: Members may request withdrawal (account deletion) at any time via in-app chat or methods designated by the Store. After withdrawal, the Store will delete the account and related data within a reasonable period. Chat history, coupons, and other usage records may become inaccessible.
terms.s9_body: Members represent and warrant that they are not members of organized crime or other anti-social forces and have no relationship with such persons. The Store may suspend or delete accounts without notice if it determines otherwise.
terms.s10_body: The Store may change, temporarily suspend, or discontinue the App without prior notice. The Store is not liable for damages arising therefrom.
terms.s11_body: Except for intentional misconduct or gross negligence, the Store is not liable for damages arising from use of the App (including inability to use due to network failure, device issues, third-party service outages, or data loss). The App is provided “as is” without warranty of completeness, accuracy, or usefulness.
terms.s12_body: The Store may change these Terms as needed. Revised Terms take effect when posted in the App. Material changes will be announced in the App.
terms.s13_body: These Terms are governed by the laws of Japan. Disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the court having jurisdiction over the Store’s principal place of business as the court of first instance.
dates: Revised: April 2026 (added campaigns, lotteries, and prizes)

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: FKT7 (“the App”) is created by Suito Sogyo Co., Ltd. and provided to VIP members of 7-Eleven Higashihiracho Store, Hiranokitani Store, and Ninjaichieki-Minami Store (“the Store”). This Privacy Policy describes how we handle personal information in the App.
privacy.s1_body:
We may collect:
・Name, email, birth month, attributes (e.g., gender)
・Usage data (chat content, coupon usage history, etc.)
・Device information (browser type, OS, etc.)
privacy.s2_body:
We use collected information to:
・Authenticate members and manage accounts
・Provide chat, coupons, announcements, and other services
・Respond to inquiries
・Improve and develop services
privacy.s3_body: We will not provide your personal information to third parties without your consent except as required by law.
privacy.s4_p1: The App uses Google Firebase (Authentication, Firestore, Storage, etc.) for authentication, database, and storage. Some information may be processed by these services.
privacy.s4_p2_intro: For more on Firebase and Google privacy, see:
privacy.s5_p1: We may use cookies and local storage for the following purposes:
privacy.s5_li2: Storing settings required for the App
privacy.s5_p2: We use these only as needed to provide the App. If we use cookies for advertising or measurement in the future, we will revise this policy and notify you in the App. You may disable them in browser settings, but some features may not work.
privacy.s6_p1: Where ads or affiliate links appear, we generally do not provide members’ personal information to partners for tracking unless the ad’s design requires it. After you leave for an external site, handling of personal information follows that site’s policy.
privacy.s6_p2_before: For our display policy, see the
privacy.s7_body:
We retain information as follows:
・Account information: until withdrawal or deletion request, then delete within a reasonable period
・Chat and coupon history: as needed for service and as required by law
・We delete data promptly after retention ends or upon request
privacy.s8_body: You may request access, correction, deletion, or restriction regarding your personal information via in-app chat. We will respond in accordance with applicable law after identity verification.
privacy.s9_body: If we offer push notifications, we may send alerts for new messages or announcements. You can turn off notifications in device or in-app settings.
privacy.s10_body: We take appropriate security measures to prevent leaks, loss, or damage of personal information. Third-party services such as Firebase also handle data under their security standards.
privacy.s11_body: For inquiries about this policy, contact us via in-app chat.
privacy.s12_body: We may revise this policy due to legal or service changes. Revised policies take effect when posted in the App. Material changes will be announced in the App.

tokushoho.title: Specified Commercial Transactions Act Notice
tokushoho.intro: The App is created by Suito Sogyo Co., Ltd. and provided to VIP members of the three 7-Eleven stores listed below. The following notice is provided under Japan’s Specified Commercial Transactions Act.
tokushoho.businessNameBody:
Suito Sogyo Co., Ltd.
(Operator of 7-Eleven Higashihiracho, Hiranokitani, Ninjaichieki-Minami stores)
tokushoho.contactBody: Please contact us via in-app chat.
tokushoho.priceBody: Coupon and announcement services in the App are free of charge. For reservations and holds, payment is made at the store.
tokushoho.paymentBody: There are no in-app payments. Pay at the store when you pick up goods.
tokushoho.deliveryBody: Reserved goods are provided at the store according to in-app guidance.
tokushoho.returnsBody: Due to the nature of goods, please contact us via in-app chat as soon as possible if you need to cancel a reservation. We will respond case by case.
tokushoho.serviceTimingBody: Member services (chat, coupons, announcements) are available immediately after registration.
tokushoho.thirdPartyBody: For ads or links where a third party other than the seller above provides goods or services, that third party is the seller. Contract terms, price, payment, delivery, returns, and cancellation follow the third party.

advertising.title: Advertising, Promotion & Affiliate Notice
advertising.intro: FKT7 (“the App”) is created by Suito Sogyo Co., Ltd. and provided by the three 7-Eleven stores listed in the App (“the Store”). This page describes how advertising, promotions, and performance-based referrals (including affiliate programs) may appear in the App.
advertising.s1_p1: The Store may display one or more of the following as needed to operate the App:
advertising.s1_li1: Banner or text ads for the Store’s or third parties’ goods or services
advertising.s1_li2: Links introducing third-party services or goods (including performance-based / affiliate links)
advertising.s1_li3: Related displays (rotating banners, campaign notices, etc.)
advertising.s1_p2: Partners, content, duration, and placement may change or end at the Store’s discretion.
advertising.s2_body: The Store follows relevant guidelines on fair labeling and stealth marketing and, where appropriate, labels content as “Ad,” “PR,” “Affiliate,” etc. Where an affiliate program has its own terms, those terms apply.
advertising.s3_p1: For links where a third party other than the Store sells goods or services, that third party is the seller. Contracts, payment, returns, cancellation, and support between you and the third party follow the third party’s terms. The Store is not responsible for third-party services or transactions (except where the Store directly provides the product or service).
advertising.s3_p2: After you visit an external site, handling of personal information follows that site’s privacy policy.
advertising.s4_before_terms: For conditions of use, see the
advertising.s5_body: This notice may be revised due to legal or service changes. Revised content takes effect when posted in the App. Material changes will be announced in the App.

licenses.title: Open Source Licenses
licenses.intro: This App was created by Suito Sogyo Co., Ltd. It uses the following open-source software and services; we comply with each license and retain copyright notices and license terms.
licenses.mitBody: May be used commercially or non-commercially. Modification and redistribution are allowed if copyright and license notices are retained.
licenses.apacheBody: Broadly usable; certain notice obligations apply for modifications.
licenses.firebaseBefore: A service provided by Google. Use is subject to the
licenses.fullTextBody: Full texts are available on each project page or via
